title: Moong Dal Chilla with Paneer Stuffing
description: Thin moong-dal chillas filled with grated paneer and served with a cooling mint-curd dip.
steps: Blend the soaked moong dal with ginger, cumin, salt, and a little water.
Adjust with water to make a thin, dosa-like batter.
Pour a portion onto a lightly oiled non-stick pan and cook like a chilla.
Add grated paneer to one half, fold, and cook briefly until warmed through.
Mix the curd, mint, roasted cumin, and salt, then serve alongside the chilla.
notes: The stated cooking time assumes the moong dal is already soaked.
